NF.description: **#NF#** - Not found. The requested symbol could not be found by the service.

NA.description: **#NA#** - Not Applicable. The requested field could not be found for the requested symbol. This usually means that the field is not applicable for this type of record.

NE.description: **#NE#** - Not Entitled. The supplied username and password are not entitled to the data requested.
